text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Phew! Another day, another go at becoming an
amazing Umamusume, just like Suzuka!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: ...Hold up. That little girl...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
O-oh my gosh, she's adorable! Look at her
Umamusume ears and tail!

text_block_list.name: Girl A
text_block_list.text: Huh... Omigosh! Is that...

text_block_list.name: Girl A
text_block_list.text: It is! It's Spe! Yippee! Spe!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Whoa, huh? C-could you be...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: M-my fan?!

text_block_list.name: Girl A
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! I saw you run at the festival the daycare
put on!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
The daycare... Oh, yeah! I think I remember going
as part of my volunteer activities!

text_block_list.name: Girl A
text_block_list.text: Hehe! You were so cool back then, Spe.

text_block_list.name: Girl A
text_block_list.text: I wanna be just like you when I grow up!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
What?! B-but, um... wasn't I super uncool back
then?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I fell over 'cause I got so nervous. I was totally
covered in mud...

text_block_list.name: Girl A
text_block_list.text:
So? You got up again, didn't you? And then you
zoooomed ahead super fast!

text_block_list.name: Girl A
text_block_list.text:
It was like magic! You were the coolest one that
day!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
What? B-but I'm not the kind of Umamusume that
should be admired...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
W-wait! Have you heard of Suzuka? Silence
Suzuka?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: She's the one who got first place that day. The way she runs is so beautiful, and she's super cool!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: She should get all of your attention...

text_block_list.name: Girl A
text_block_list.text: Awww, why? I can't run like her...

text_block_list.name: Girl A
text_block_list.text: But I can do my best, just like you do, Spe!

text_block_list.name: Girl A
text_block_list.text:
I wanna be someone who doesn't give up, even if
they mess up! Just like you!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Someone like me... who doesn't give up, no
matter what...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm taking a break in the central plaza in between
training sessions when I spot Silence Suzuka and
Special Week.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Oh. Hello, Spe.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: S-Suzuka, listen! Um, so just now...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
It sounds like a lovely exchange. Your little
friend's eyes must have been sparkling with
happiness.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Y-yeah, they were! How did you know?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Well, I had a hunch she acted just the way you do
when you talk about me.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
...I'm sure you gave her something that only
you're capable of.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Something only I can give, huh? I never would've
thought I had anything like that.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Hehe I'm glad you finally realize what makes you
so great.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: ...Um, Suzuka?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I really do look up to you. I do want to be just
like you.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: But now, I want to cherish myself just as much!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
So instead of copying all of you, I'll take the bits
that I admire most and create an even better
version of me!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
That way I can hold onto the parts of me that
little girl admired so much.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: ...Hehe. Then what will you incorporate first?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... I guess I'll start with how calm you are! It's
important to have a level head!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Oh, before I forget... I heard we're having carrot
hamburger steaks for dinner tonight.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: No way, really?! Then I've gotta hurry back and—

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Ahem, start my evening with a quick shower. I'll
catch you later, Suzuka!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
She's awfully true to herself—quick to explode
with energy over the things that make her
happy...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: And that's what I admire about you, Spe.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Special Week runs off as Silence Suzuka looks on.
Whether it's for dinner or her dreams, she will
never give up.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: What?! Oh no, they might run out if I don't hurry!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
But wait! I'm all sweaty, so I need to take a
shower first!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Or what if I just head straight there?!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
B-but Suzuka wouldn't do something like that...
A-anyway, I've gotta get a move on!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Sorry, Suzuka! I'm gonna go take a shower!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... She just finished training, yet she's so full
of energy.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Her energy is so infectious. Just being around her
makes me happy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Special Week charges off, focused on her goal as
always, as Silence Suzuka watches on.
